'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/feedmix?__cf_chl_rt_tk=O0WCALv2RdQaRK6n5CvY0L7cPEUWVmTHiLw7PP6iwf8-1776579768-1.0.1.1-Yl.sZuRufPhMG5VOO2tXPzegS7p0F6J6j74NKQsRL8g"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
